hooks.command:
node -e "process.stderr.write('
go-loyalty-point — Loyalty Points HTTP API
Stack: Go 1.23 · Gin · PostgreSQL · Redis · Kafka · zerolog · Docker
SDLC: .claude/agents/sdlc.md | Commands: /analyze_codebase /plan_feature /review_code /run_tests

');"

CMD=$(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',d).get('command',''))" 2>/dev/null || true); case "$CMD" in *grep*|*rg\ *|*ripgrep*|*find\ *|*fd\ *|*ack\ *|*ag\ *)   [ -f graphify-out/graph.json ] &&   echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"graphify: knowledge graph at graphify-out/. For focused questions, run `graphify query \"<question>\"` instead of grepping raw files."}}' || true ;; esac
